channel.title: Toys Outlet on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux
channel.description: Recent content in Toys Outlet on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux

item.title: LEGO Disney Wish Asha s Cottage Playset Opening Toy Dollshouse from Wish Movie with Asha Sakina and Sabino Mini-Dolls and Star Figure Idea for Kids Girls and Boys 43231
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Disney Wish Asha s Cottage Playset Opening Toy Dollshouse from Wish Movie with Asha Sakina and Sabino Mini-Dolls and Star Figure Idea for Kids Girls and Boys 43231 at the following link: ℹ️: The ground floor of the LEGO house contains a kitchen with a table, smiley-face cake, cabinets with a notebook, plus a spoon and a fork This LEGO ǀ Disney Wish dollshouse building toy for 7+ year old girls and boys combines with others in the series (43223 and 43224, sold separately) Features Asha, Sakina and Sabino LEGO ǀ Disney Wish mini-dolls, plus a Star figure, as well as a 2-storey toy house with hinged, opening sides Kids aged 7+ can bring the adventures of Walt Disney Animation Studios movie Wish to life with the LEGO ǀ Disney Wish Ashas Cottage playset Upstairs is a bedroom with a bed and fireplace, while outside there is a wishing well, so kids can make up fun stories inspired by the Wish movie Makes a great kids Christmas gift or any time treat for fans of Disney movies; inspires adventures and takes their imaginations to new levels of play 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Friends Heartlake City Bus Toy Mini-Dolls Vehicle Playset with Paisley Friendship Gift Toys for Girls Boys Kids 7 Plus Years old Amazon Exclusive 41759
item.description: You can find LEGO Friends Heartlake City Bus Toy Mini-Dolls Vehicle Playset with Paisley Friendship Gift Toys for Girls Boys Kids 7 Plus Years old Amazon Exclusive 41759 with a discount here: ℹ️: Kids can join Paisley on a tour of the town with the LEGO Friends Heartlake City Bus playset, featuring a toy bus, 3 mini-dolls and accessories The bus roof can be removed; a sidewall opens to access the inside; the destination sign can be changed to different locations in Heartlake City This LEGO Friends building toy for kids, girls and boys aged 7+ makes a great stand alone toy or fun addition to any Heartlake City collection Kids can activate the function on the bus to move the ramp in and out to pick up the passengers, or attach the charger to the bus to refuel The friendship bus toy playset features Paisley, a bus driver and a passenger mini-dolls, a toy mobility scooter, ramp and ‘electric’ charger 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO DUPLO Town Learn About Chinese Culture 10411 Educational Building Toy Set; Includes Chinese Food Toys a Panda and 3 Family Figures for Kids Aged 2 and over 124 Pieces
item.description: You’ve got LEGO DUPLO Town Learn About Chinese Culture 10411 Educational Building Toy Set; Includes Chinese Food Toys a Panda and 3 Family Figures for Kids Aged 2 and over 124 Pieces at the following link: ℹ️: The activity area of this LEGO DUPLO bricks set includes a Xiangqi chess set, masks, traditional pen and inkwell plus a toy Ruan instrument Educational toy for toddlers features a café, temple and activity area plus lots of authentic elements that showcase traditional Chinese life Introduce young kids to Chinese culture through this LEGO DUPLO early learning toy for toddlers 2+ years old that celebrates Chinese traditions Teach your kids about Chinese culture in the temple which features a sun roof decoration representing one half of the Yin and Yang concept Included in the set are 3 LEGO DUPLO family figures in traditional Chinese dress plus a cute toy panda figure with some bamboo to chew on Kids role-play drinking tea, eating moon cake or dumplings from the steamer, have a ride on the bunny lantern or play under the blossom tree Little fingers will love opening the hinged doors and windows as well as the toy treasure chest where they can hide their special items 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO 41713 Friends Olivia’s Space Academy Shuttle Rocket Educational Toy Gifts for 8 Plus Year Old Kids Girls & Boys with Astronaut Mini-Dolls
item.description: You’ve got LEGO 41713 Friends Olivia’s Space Academy Shuttle Rocket Educational Toy Gifts for 8 Plus Year Old Kids Girls & Boys with Astronaut Mini-Dolls at the following link: ℹ️: The free LEGO Building Instructions app lets kids zoom, rotate and view their toy spaceship model in 3D as they build This LEGO space rocket toy is a rewarding challenge for future astronauts and makes an out-of-this-world gift for kids, boys and girls age 8 plus Many scientifically accurate elements packed into this educational astronaut toy teach kids about the space program LEGO Friends space toy also includes 4 mini-dolls: LEGO Friends Olivia and William in astronaut suits with helmets, Dr Vidya and Julian Kids take part in astronaut training, simulate a flight in the toy Space Shuttle, complete a spacewalk & search the cosmos for new galaxies Features a LEGO Space Shuttle toy, an academy building, mission control with a telescope and a multi-axis trainer Join Olivia as her dreams come true and she gains entry to the Space Academy where she can train to be an astronaut 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO 71469 DREAMZzz Nightmare Shark Ship Set Build a Pirate Ship Toy in 2 Ways Dream Boat Model Building Kit with Mateo Izzie Nova & Nightmare King Minifigures Toys for Kids Girls Boys
item.description: You’ve got LEGO 71469 DREAMZzz Nightmare Shark Ship Set Build a Pirate Ship Toy in 2 Ways Dream Boat Model Building Kit with Mateo Izzie Nova & Nightmare King Minifigures Toys for Kids Girls Boys at the following link: ℹ️: Full of fun features; the shark boat toy has an opening jaw, a secret treasure chest, removable rear cabin, cage, trapdoor and swivelling turrets The adventure toy set features story-led building instructions (also available in the LEGO Builder app) to lead kids on a creative journey The model building kit includes 4 LEGO DREAMZzz minifigures: Mateo, Izzie, Nova and the Nightmare King to help bring the magical TV story to life This LEGO DREAMZzz Nightmare Shark Ship building set with a dream pirate ship toy and 4 minifigures lets kids build an awesome vehicle toy in 2 ways This LEGO DREAMZzz building toys ship mode has powerful engines and sails, while the tank mode features cool accessories and flying eyeballs Night Hunter combined Izzie’s favourite cuddly toy with a pirate ship to create a monster vehicle; the boat toy can be built in ship- or tank mode This cool vehicle toy playset allows kids to escape into the world of LEGO DREAMZzz; imaginative play toys make great birthday gifts or Christmas presents for kids, girls and boys 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO 71409 Super Mario Big Spike’s Cloudtop Challenge Expansion Set Toys for Kids Boys and Girls with 3 Figures including Boomerang Bro and Piranha Plant Collectible Giftsc Multicolor
item.description: You’ve got LEGO 71409 Super Mario Big Spike’s Cloudtop Challenge Expansion Set Toys for Kids Boys and Girls with 3 Figures including Boomerang Bro and Piranha Plant Collectible Giftsc Multicolor at the following link: ℹ️: Lego Super Mario expansion sets make great Birthday, Christmas gifts or any time toys for kids who own Lego Super Mario Starter course This Lego Super Mario buildable toy expansion set requires one of the Lego Super Mario Starter Courses (71360, 71387 or 71403) to play Unlock the fun with the Lego Super Mario companion app - For a list of compatible Android and iOS devices Players then gain Super Star Block power and jump on the seesaw to defeat the Piranha Plant, or allow kids to invent their own levels This Lego Super Mario expansion set features 3 popular enemies, Big Spike, Boomerang Bro and a Piranha Plant for new sky level challenges This Lego Super Mario buildable toy game let kids recreate the iconic game : Jump on the orange Mushroom Trampolines to get to the Boomerang Bro Players earn digital coins for helping Lego Mario, Lego Luigi or Lego Peach (figures not included) dodge the spiked roller thrown by the Big Spike 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO 43221 Disney 100 Years of Disney Animation Icons Character Wall Art Craft Set 72 Fun Mosaic Designs to Create Includes Exclusive Mickey Mouse Artist Minifigure Toy for Kids
item.description: You’ve got LEGO 43221 Disney 100 Years of Disney Animation Icons Character Wall Art Craft Set 72 Fun Mosaic Designs to Create Includes Exclusive Mickey Mouse Artist Minifigure Toy for Kids at the following link: ℹ️: Includes a Disney’s Mickey Mouse LEGO minifigure with a torso and legs decorated exclusively for this set, holding a brush and palette This LEGO Disney 100 years of Disney Animation Icons craft set lets kids 6+ pick from 72 Disney designs to create a collage LEGO art to display The LEGO Disney toy mosaic set includes 12 8x8 plates, picture frame, hanger elements and loads of tiles to build up to 12 Disney icons at once With this Disney crafts set, kids can choose to create their favourite icons and display their art with pride as wall art or bedroom decoration With an instruction booklet to guide designs, this Disney art set is great for group play and helps to develop vital life skills through fun Includes designs such as Snow White, Princess Jasmine, Frozens Olaf and Elsa, Mickey and Minnie Mouse, Belle, Ariel The Little Mermaid, and more; perfect for Disney fans Give this premium LEGO wall art set as a creative Disney gift to kids, girls and boys aged 6+, family or friends with a passion for Disney toys, characters, art and design 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Harry Potter Hogwarts Astronomy Tower Castle Toy Playset for Kids Girls & Boys with 8 Character Minifigures including Herione and Ron plus Hedwig the Owl Figure Wizarding World Gifts 75969
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Harry Potter Hogwarts Astronomy Tower Castle Toy Playset for Kids Girls & Boys with 8 Character Minifigures including Herione and Ron plus Hedwig the Owl Figure Wizarding World Gifts 75969 at the following link: ℹ️: Kids can build the multi-level LEGO Hogwarts Castle Astronomy Tower and explore all it has to offer while recreating scenes from the Harry Potter movies Also includes a toy Hedwig the owl figure, plus accessories like letters, wands, book of potions, broomstick, cakes, wine glasses, lanterns, torches and candles This LEGO Harry Potter Hogwarts Castle buildable toy makes a magical birthday gift for a son or daughter, or a surprise toy treat or boys and girls aged 9+, and all kids who love the Wizarding World adventures This LEGO Harry Potter building toy for kids aged 9+ features a Hogwarts castle Astronomy Tower model, 8 minifigures and loads of magical fun Great for role play; kids can search the sky with the telescope, check the mandrakes in the greenhouse, chill in the Ravenclaw dorm or join Slughorns party Includes LEGO Harry Potter, Hermione Granger, Ron Weasley, Luna Lovegood, Neville Longbottom, Draco Malfoy, Lavender Brown and Professor Slughorn minifgures 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Marvel King Namor’s Throne Room 76213 Building Kit; Black Panther Underwater Submarine Adventures; Birthday Gift Construction Toy for Super-Hero Fans and Kids Aged 7+ 355 Pieces
item.description: You can find LEGO Marvel King Namor’s Throne Room 76213 Building Kit; Black Panther Underwater Submarine Adventures; Birthday Gift Construction Toy for Super-Hero Fans and Kids Aged 7+ 355 Pieces with a discount here: ℹ️: The submarine toy for kids features stud shooters and King Namors throne room is decorated with seaweed, fish and an opening shark jaw throne This LEGO Black Panther submarine building toy for kids, boys and girls aged 7 years old makes a great birthday gift for Marvel Avengers fans This LEGO Marvel building toy features a toy submarine and King Namor’s Throne Room from Marvel Studios Black Panther: Wakanda Forever Connects with all other LEGO Marvel Super Hero sets, plus its compact size makes this Black Panther playset an ideal travel toy - kids can take it anywhere Kids can relive their favourite scenes with their favourite Black Panther characters, and when the action is over, the toys look great on display Kids can play out endless adventures with the 3 LEGO Marvel minifigures of Shuri, Attuma and King Namor, plus cool toy weapons and accessories 🛒 Buy it!
